tasks.label: Deploy to GitHub Pages
tasks.command: git subtree push --prefix public origin gh-pages
tasks.detail: Push the public/ directory to the gh-pages branch

tasks.label: Deploy to GitHub Pages (Force)
tasks.command: git push origin $(git subtree split --prefix public):gh-pages --force
tasks.detail: Force push the public/ directory to gh-pages (use when subtree push fails due to history mismatch)
